name: Bread, Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, brown sugar, flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
2. Add the eggs, oil, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Grate the zucchini and add it to the mixture. Stir until evenly distributed.
4. Divide the batter evenly between two greased loaf pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the bread to cool on a wire rack before serving or freezing if desired.
